text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking with Air Groove in the central
plaza, I hear a loud voice.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Talk to ya later, mom! Love ya lots!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Howdy, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I should have guessed it was you. Was that your
mother on the line?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! Just puttin' in a request for some
snacks!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There's this snack that they don't sell here!
Barbecue-flavored carrot chips! Yum!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
S-seriously? Don't you think it's a bit
presumptuous to expect that of her?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Nah, she's pleased as punch to do it! She gets the
biggest smile whenever I ask for anythin'.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Are you sayin' your mom doesn't spoil you, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My mother is very busy. She doesn't have time to
waste on such things.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What in tarnation?! Moms gotta spoil their kids! It's in the constitution!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're sayin' she doesn't get on your case about
how much you call? Or send care packages you
didn't even ask for?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Well, sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! Sheesh! I bet she's just waitin' for ya to
ask her for some love!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hurry up and give her a call, why don't ya!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why do your wild claims sound so oddly
persuasive?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I've never done anything like that before. I
wouldn't know what to say...
choice_data_list: Just say you want to hear her voice.
Isn't there anything you'd like her to send?
Isn't there anything you'd like her to send?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I've never done anything like that before. I
wouldn't know what to say...
choice_data_list: Just say you want to hear her voice.
Isn't there anything you'd like her to send?
Isn't there anything you'd like her to send?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I... guess I could do that...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There ya go! Sounds like a fine idea to me! I know
I give my mom a ring just to hear her voice
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...All right. I'll go call her.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What're we doin' just standin' around for? We're
gettin' after her, ain't we?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, I... I was wondering how you were.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Is everything all right?! What happened?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, nothing. I'm fine. I just... wanted to hear your
voice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Something has happened, hasn't it? This is so unlike you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I said I'm fine! I really just wanted to talk
with you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One of the other students said that mothers get
worried if their daughters don't ask for their help
from time to time...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. Oh, Air Groove, I take it back—this is exactly like you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I appreciate the gesture, dear. You do whatever it is you want to do though, okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I promise to keep doing my best over
here.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! Aren't you just as cute as a button?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wh-where did you come from?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I swear, if you ain't just the sweetest little bundle
of cute when you're talkin' with your mom!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Aha! I see what's going on!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You two are about to receive a lesson in what
happens when you eavesdrop on people! And you
can believe that's a mistake you won't be making
again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gives us quite the earful, but it does
seem somewhat shorter than her usual lectures.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Come on, I'm not a child.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Like snacks!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't lump me in with you! Snacks! Good grief...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Hold on... I've thought of something. I'll go
call her.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get after her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Mother. Do you remember those cookies
you used to make when I was younger?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've been trying to recreate them from memory,
but it's not going so well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Want me to send you the recipe?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was... wondering if you might be willing
to... Instead of the recipe...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: This ain't going so hot! Wait here a tick!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, darling! If you want some of mom's
cookies, you can't beat around the bush!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Taiki?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! Oh, I see! Air Groove, you were always
so indirect!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Is that Taiki there with you? Hi! Take good care
of Air Groove, please!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You got it, boss!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Mother, please...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'll bake a batch of cookies and send them as
soon as I can! I'll be sure to send enough for your
friends, so give some to Taiki too!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...So. Do you two have anything to say for yourselves?
choice_data_list: I'm happy she got the message!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yup! Everyone's happy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You fools! That is not what I'm referring to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Air Groove gives us an earful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I find some cookies on my desk.
They have a refined flavor and a certain warmth
that lingers on the tongue. Absolutely delicious.
